purpose: Make the platform-core business-kernel gap explicit and verify the minimum cross-industry scope artifact outside the construction module.
gap_statement: Without an industry module, smart_core historically provided runtime and UI contract infrastructure but no reusable business/carrier scope vocabulary.
kernel: platform -> company -> business -> carrier -> fact -> projection
decision: Fill the core gap first with company access and an abstract platform scope contract, not a concrete business source-of-truth table.

minimum_kernel_artifacts.purpose: Answer which companies can use the platform, which plan/capabilities apply, and what usage/ops state is attached to that company.
Provide cross-industry optional business and carrier scope metadata for industry facts and projections.

next_gate: Only promote to a concrete business/carrier table after multiple runtime models prove shared lifecycle, ownership, and projection needs.
